rows.label: qev025806_MSG0001
rows.name:
Fraisie has granted us a new light.
That is the God of Miracles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025806_MSG0002
rows.name:
The God of Miracles bestows miracles equally
upon those who believe. Through that,
countless Ma-non lives have been saved.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025806_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Well? Won't you join
the faith as well?[ST:wait ]
